sprint_goal: Establish EKS infrastructure, secure Auth service, and core database schema.
key_deliverables: EKS Cluster, RDS (pgvector), Auth Service with RBAC, Vendor Schema
demo_objectives: Show cluster connectivity, Login flow with RBAC, Vendor CRUD API
success_criteria: Infra deployed via Terraform; Auth API responding; Vendor DB migrated
risk_factors: EKS configuration complexity; Auth integration nuances
mitigation_strategies: Use EKS Blueprints; Early integration testing of Auth guard

sprint_goal: Enable bulk vendor onboarding, AI SOW ingestion, and Stripe payment collection.
key_deliverables: Bulk CSV Import Service, AI Pipeline (Extraction->Redaction), Stripe Invoicing
demo_objectives: Upload 5k row CSV; Process dummy SOW through AI; Generate Stripe Invoice
success_criteria: CSV import doesn't block event loop; PII successfully redacted; Webhooks secured
mitigation_strategies: Implement PII Regex pre-screen; Use Streams for CSV

sprint_goal: Complete vector matching logic, secure payout distribution, and review UI.
key_deliverables: Vector Search Engine, Payout Saga Coordinator, SOW Review UI
demo_objectives: Semantic vendor search; End-to-End Payout with rollback test; SOW UI walkthrough
success_criteria: Vector search < 200ms; Saga handles failure correctly; UI is responsive
risk_factors: Distributed transaction consistency (High); Vector search tuning
mitigation_strategies: Chaos testing on Payout Saga; k6 load testing on vector search
